zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stewart of Ralston於1318年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾洛斯頓時，他的父親Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland22歲，母親Isabel de Graham29歲。他於1338年之前與Alicia Elizabeth Mure結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1380年在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stewart of Ralston于1318年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾洛斯頓时，他的父亲Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland22岁，母亲Isabel de Graham29岁。他于1338年之前与Alicia Elizabeth Mure结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1380年在英国苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰維托史爾加利艾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stewart of Ralston was born in 1318, in Ralston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, was 22 and his mother, Isabel de Graham, was 29. He married Alicia Elizabeth Mure before 1338. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1346. He died in 1380, in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stewart of Ralston est né en 1318, à Ralston, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Graham, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Elizabeth Mure avant 1338. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé en 1380, à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stewart of Ralston 1318 in Ralston, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland 22 und seine Mutter Isabel de Graham 29. Er hat vor 1338 Alicia Elizabeth Mure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alicia Elizabeth Mure prima del 1338. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì nel 1380, nel Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stewart of Ralstonが1318年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアラルストンで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotlandは22歳，母Isabel de Grahamは29歳であった。1338年以前にAlicia Elizabeth Mureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1380年にイギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンで62歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアガーリーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stewart of Ralston(이)가 1318년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 랠스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Graham(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1338년 이전 Alicia Elizabeth Mure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 가리스턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Alicia Elizabeth Mure antes 1338. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stewart of Ralston родился в 1318 г. в местности ралстон, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Graham, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Elizabeth Mure перед 1338 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности гарлиестон, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stewart of Ralston nació en 1318, en Ralston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel de Graham, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alicia Elizabeth Mure antes de 1338. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió en 1380, en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Garlieston, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
